content.problemStatement:
Given a m x n grid filled with non-negative numbers, find a path from top left to bottom right, which minimizes the sum of all numbers along its path.


Note: You can only move either down or right at any point in time.
content.outputFormat: The minimum sum of all numbers along the path from top left to bottom right

solution.approach: Use dynamic programming to store the minimum sum of all numbers along the path to each cell
